calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
TENTATIVE RULING: OFF CALENDAR
EXAMINER: HELEN TROWBRIDGE

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-23-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Stacey Herter for administrator Kathryn Mary Lang, who was also present (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Final Distribution.

The Court inquired whether the sole heir objected to the final account, requested fees, or proposed distribution. Ms. Herter represented that there were no objections. The Court stated it had reviewed the petition and supporting declarations, including those addressing the fee issues noted by the Probate Examiner.

Finding no objection, the Court took the matter under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Michael B. McNaughton; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-13-2025 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jun-09-2025 Off Calendar

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-10-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Rebekah Swan appeared by zoom for and with Kathryn Lang (administrator) by zoom.

The court noted that the estate denied the Franchise Tax Board's ("FTB") claim, that the FTB opened a case in the Civil Court, and informed Mrs. Swan that it cannot extend administration of the estate for two years, but it can approve it for one year. Mrs. Swan informed the court that there is also an issue with the Internal Revenue Service, that eighteen years of tax returns have been filed and that only eight years have been addressed. The Status Report of Administration, etc. is granted for a one-year extension for administration of the estate (proposed order to be revised and signed). A status hearing for filing of a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for June 9, 2025, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Said petition is to be filed one week prior.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Malone/Santos. Not reported.
